mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, target_type, target_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
